images.title: Bateau taxi inconnu - Agde, 2015.jpg
images.description: An unknow water taxi on the Hérault, in the Grau d’Agde, on July 30, 2015.

images.title: "Bucentaure 3", "Bucentaure 4" & navire inconnu - La Tamarissière, 2015.jpg
images.description: The water taxis Bucentaure 3, Bucentaure 4 and an unknow water taxi on the Hérault, in La Tamarissière, on July 30, 2015.

images.title: "Bucentaure 3" - Le Grau d'Agde, 2015.jpg
images.description: The ferry Bucentaure 3 on the Hérault, in the Grau d’Agde, on July 29, 2015.

images.title: "Vincenzo" - Grau d'Agde, 2015.jpg
images.description: The fishing ship Vincenzo on the Hérault, in the Grau d’Agde, on August 29, 2015.
